message:
Continue FrankenStorage migration: fix Source deserialization and remaining params! calls

Migrate remaining params! → fparams! calls in FrankenStorage methods (Source
queries, embedding job queries, message queries). Fix Source deserialization to
use SourceKind::parse() with default fallback and parse config_json from String
to serde_json::Value. Fix query_with_params → query_params method name.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
